title: PMO (Core Banking)
description:
Position Summary:

We are seeking an experienced PMO (Core Banking)to join our dynamic team. This role will play a critical role in supporting the core banking transformationinitiative. This includes driving project governance, coordinatingcross-functional teams, managing timelines, and ensuring alignment betweenbusiness and technology stakeholders. The PMO will help establish thefoundation for successful execution of the full transformation program.

Roles& Responsibilities:

·      Supportplanning and execution of project activities across multiple workstreams

·      Developand maintain project plans, dashboards, and milestone trackers

·      Facilitatestakeholder meetings, workshops, and steering committees

·      Trackand report progress, risks, issues, and dependencies

·      Ensuredocumentation of scope, requirements, and decisions

·      Coordinatewith business analysts, architects, and vendor teams

·      Assistin resource planning and budget forecasting

·      Maintainalignment with regulatory, compliance, and audit requirements

·      Prepareexecutive-level reporting and presentations

·      Supportchange management and communication efforts

RequiredSkills:

·      Bachelor’sdegree in business, IT, or related field

·      5+years of experience in project management or PMO roles

·      Experiencein banking or financial services, preferably in core banking projects

·      Familiaritywith large-scale transformations

·      Strongunderstanding of project governance frameworks (e.g., Agile, Waterfall, Hybrid)

·      Proficiencyin tools like MS Project, JIRA, Confluence, Excel, PowerPoint

PreferredQualifications:

·      Experiencein a client-facing role, with a proven track record of managing clientrelationships.

·      PMP,PRINCE2, or similar certification

·      Excellentcommunication and stakeholder management skills

·      Analyticalmindset with attention to detail

·      Abilityto work in a fast-paced, multi-country environment

·      Experiencewith vendor coordination and SOW management

·      Self-disciplined

PreferredEducation:

·      Bachelor’sdegree/master’s degree in information technology, Computer Science orequivalent work experience, or combination

Experience:Minimum of 5 yearsin relevant roles

SalaryExpectations: SGD 8,000 to SGD 10,000 per month

ContractTerm: 6-month contract to start, with opportunity for extension based onperformance.

postedCompany.description: The Company's principal activity is manpower contracting services with other information technology and computer services.
postedCompany.name: EXCELTECH COMPUTERS PTE. LTD.
